source.title: Former finalist Noha Akugue wins all-German derby vs. Steiner in Hamburg

description: An all-German first-round derby at the MSC Hamburg Ladies Open saw 2023 finalist Noma Noha Akugue defeat 20-year-old wild card Valentina Steiner in three sets. The result was Noha Akugue's first tour-level win since Palermo 2024.
